title: Feature issue: Notifications to TAB
author: Apollon-Theos
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->

Notifications to TAB, like "Screenshots". ListView with one row for one notification, "new" and "readed" can have bold and normal font. Maybe exist button for "Delete", "Again unread" and etc.

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, tell us how it should work -->

No pop-up windows for every notification, instead increase num...

iterations.description: Implement a visual notification system on connection tabs to alert users to events of interest related to a specific connection, such as status changes or new data.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): Implement a visual notification system on connection tabs to alert users to events of interest related to a specific connection, such as status changes or new data.
Approach: Introduce a new property or method in `ConnectionTab.cs` to manage the visual display of a notification (e.g., background color change, icon, or bolded text). Integrate this functionality into `ConnectionWindow.cs` to allow triggering and clearing these notifications dynamically based on relevant connection-related events.
